reasoning: Emotional (60%): The ruby uses warm pink/rose tones with white specular highlights — correctly friendly/warm, not grim. The round silhouette reads as a toy-like treasure. However, the palette leans pastel-soft rather than the saturated punchy pinks/reds expected for ZEoW's bright Hyrule mood. Compared to the kind of vivid, almost candy-like saturation the style demands, this reads slightly muted. Emotional score ~6. Technical (40%): Zoom panels confirm 1px hard outlines are present and shading uses approximately 3 tones (highlight white, mid pink, shadow dark-pink/maroon). Pixel placement appears grid-snapped with no visible anti-aliasing. However, at base resolution the gem silhouette is irregular and blob-like rather than a clean iconic gem form, which weakens legibility. The Denzi reference (helmets) demonstrates tighter, more deliberate pixel sculpting with stronger value contrast — the ruby candidate's form is fuzzier by comparison. Technical score ~6. Weighted combined: 0.6×6 + 0.4×6 = 6. Verdict: marginal. Needs a saturation pass (push reds/pinks more vivid) and silhouette tightening at base scale to reach pass.
